name: EagleOne Metals Corp.
description: EagleOne Metals Corp. is a Canadian mineral exploration company focused on the acquisition, exploration, and development of high-potential resource properties. The company's primary asset is the Magusi West Project, located in the Abitibi region of Quebec, a world-class mining jurisdiction. EagleOne Metals is dedicated to identifying and advancing strategic mineral projects that offer significant value to shareholders while adhering to responsible exploration practices. Through its exploration efforts, the company aims to discover and delineate economic mineral deposits, particularly focusing on gold and base metal opportunities in stable and prolific mining districts.
